supporting_evidence: National framework’s “urban bias” renders Alaska invisible.*
National framework’s “progressive urban” bias misreads rural alienation as “backwardness” rather than *instrumental reason’s internalization*.*
(All tiers—national, state, county—agree on these, per 2020s fieldwork and 2026 policy evaluations)*
contradicting_evidence: (Tensions arise because each tier’s “solution” may undermine another’s goals)*
conj.subtopic: The Dialectic of Enlightenment and the Critique of Instrumental Reason
conj.state_variations: (Ranked by divergence from national consensus: national = universal critique of instrumental reason; divergence = unique structural conditions requiring distinct counter-strategy)*
conj.county_variations: (All counties face instrumental reason, but its *lived experience* and *resistance strategies* differ)*
